texto: ... we [humans] are an organic life form that became too sentient of our own existence. When we reached the moment we began to questionise our origin and our demise, that was the moment we should have stop evolving.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Anssen Augustus sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “... we [humans] are an organic life form that became too sentient of our own existence.
